title: rhododendron × hybridum
intro: Rhododendron × hybridum, also known as the hybrid rhododendron, is a cross-bred plant that combines the characteristics of different Rhododendron species, resulting in a unique and adaptable species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rhododendron × hybridum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
